source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As illustrated, let $\triangle ABC$ be an equilateral triangle. Draw a perpendicular from point $D$ on side $AB$ to $BC$ at point $E$. Construct $EF \perp DE$, intersecting $AC$ at point $F$. Draw $FG \perp AC$, meeting $BC$ at point $G$, where $FG$ and $DE$ intersect at point $M$. If $DM = ME$ and $GE = 3$, what is the length of $AB$?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text:
\textbf{Solution:} As shown in the figure, draw MN $\perp$ BC at point N, \\
$\because \triangle ABC$ is an equilateral triangle, \\
$\therefore \angle B=\angle C=60^\circ$, \\
$\because DE\perp AB$, $EF\perp DE$, $FG\perp AC$, \\
$\therefore \angle BDE=90^\circ$, $\angle DEF=90^\circ$, $\angle GFC=90^\circ$, \\
$\therefore \angle DEB=180^\circ-90^\circ-60^\circ=30^\circ$, $\angle FGC=180^\circ-90^\circ-60^\circ=30^\circ$, \\
$\therefore \angle FEC=180^\circ-90^\circ-30^\circ=60^\circ$, $\angle DEB=\angle FGC$, \\
$\therefore GN=EN=\frac{1}{2}GE=\frac{3}{2}$, \\
In $Rt\triangle MNE$, $\angle MEN=30^\circ$, $EN=\frac{3}{2}$, \\
$\therefore \frac{NE}{ME}=\cos30^\circ=\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}$, \\
$\therefore ME=\frac{\frac{3}{2}}{\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}}=\sqrt{3}$, \\
$\because DM=ME$, \\
$\therefore DE=2ME=2\sqrt{3}$, \\
In $Rt\triangle BDE$, $\angle DEB=30^\circ$, \\
$\therefore BE=\frac{DE}{\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}}=\frac{2\sqrt{3}}{\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}}=4$, \\
$\because \angle C=60^\circ$, $\angle FEC=60^\circ$, \\
$\therefore \triangle EFC$ is an equilateral triangle, \\
$\therefore \angle EFC=60^\circ$, $EF=CE$, \\
$\therefore \angle GFE=90^\circ-60^\circ=30^\circ=\angle FGC$, \\
$\therefore EF=GE=3$, \\
$\therefore CE=3$, \\
$\therefore BC=BE+CE=4+3=7$, \\
$\therefore AB=BC=\boxed{7}$, \\

image_dependency: 题干以“As illustrated”开头，且明确给出多点构造与垂直、相交关系，强依赖图形理解。
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明该题不是纯文本可充分承载的信息。
这是几何作图型问题，涉及点 D、E、F、G、M 在三边与垂线上的相对位置，视觉/空间关系重要。
multi_step: 解答链条包含多个几何性质联用：等边三角形角度、若干垂直关系、30-60-90 三角形、等边三角形判定与线段长度拼接。
条件“DM=ME”和“GE=3”都需结合中间辅助线与角度关系后才能推出边长，不是单步代入题。
题干构造步骤较多，包含至少两层以上的图形关系转换与长度推导。
verifiability: 目标答案是单一数值边长 AB，最终给出 7，结果形式清晰，便于核验。
提供了较完整的文字解法，可逐步检查角度、全等/特殊三角形关系与长度计算是否一致。
registry_passed=true，题目、答案与图像资产都已登记存在，基础可核验性较好。

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和图像资产均已登记存在，且 registry_passed=true，核心语义支撑完整。
初步评分较高：image_dependency_score=0.95、multi_step_score=0.86、verifiability_score=0.84，具有进入候选池的价值。
虽然存在 diagram_dependent 和 small_image 风险，但该样本并非缺失核心资产，仍具备可恢复和可核验条件。
answer_type_mismatch 会增加后续整理成本，但不足以否定样本的整体可用性。

asset_records.source_text_snapshot: As illustrated, let $\triangle ABC$ be an equilateral triangle. Draw a perpendicular from point $D$ on side $AB$ to $BC$ at point $E$. Construct $EF \perp DE$, intersecting $AC$ at point $F$. Draw $FG \perp AC$, meeting $BC$ at point $G$, where $FG$ and $DE$ intersect at point $M$. If $DM = ME$ and $GE = 3$, what is the length of $AB$?
asset_records.normalized_text_snapshot: As illustrated, let $\triangle ABC$ be an equilateral triangle. Draw a perpendicular from point $D$ on side $AB$ to $BC$ at point $E$. Construct $EF \perp DE$, intersecting $AC$ at point $F$. Draw $FG \perp AC$, meeting $BC$ at point $G$, where $FG$ and $DE$ intersect at point $M$. If $DM = ME$ and $GE = 3$, what is the length of $AB$?

targets.text: If $DM = ME$ and $GE = 3$, what is the length of $AB$?

answer_slots.target_text: If $DM = ME$ and $GE = 3$, what is the length of $AB$?
answer_slots.expected_answer:
\textbf{Solution:} As shown in the figure, draw MN $\perp$ BC at point N, \\
$\because \triangle ABC$ is an equilateral triangle, \\
$\therefore \angle B=\angle C=60^\circ$, \\
$\because DE\perp AB$, $EF\perp DE$, $FG\perp AC$, \\
$\therefore \angle BDE=90^\circ$, $\angle DEF=90^\circ$, $\angle GFC=90^\circ$, \\
$\therefore \angle DEB=180^\circ-90^\circ-60^\circ=30^\circ$, $\angle FGC=180^\circ-90^\circ-60^\circ=30^\circ$, \\
$\therefore \angle FEC=180^\circ-90^\circ-30^\circ=60^\circ$, $\angle DEB=\angle FGC$, \\
$\therefore GN=EN=\frac{1}{2}GE=\frac{3}{2}$, \\
In $Rt\triangle MNE$, $\angle MEN=30^\circ$, $EN=\frac{3}{2}$, \\
$\therefore \frac{NE}{ME}=\cos30^\circ=\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}$, \\
$\therefore ME=\frac{\frac{3}{2}}{\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}}=\sqrt{3}$, \\
$\because DM=ME$, \\
$\therefore DE=2ME=2\sqrt{3}$, \\
In $Rt\triangle BDE$, $\angle DEB=30^\circ$, \\
$\therefore BE=\frac{DE}{\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}}=\frac{2\sqrt{3}}{\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}}=4$, \\
$\because \angle C=60^\circ$, $\angle FEC=60^\circ$, \\
$\therefore \triangle EFC$ is an equilateral triangle, \\
$\therefore \angle EFC=60^\circ$, $EF=CE$, \\
$\therefore \angle GFE=90^\circ-60^\circ=30^\circ=\angle FGC$, \\
$\therefore EF=GE=3$, \\
$\therefore CE=3$, \\
$\therefore BC=BE+CE=4+3=7$, \\
$\therefore AB=BC=\boxed{7}$, \\
